title: High Borosilicate Glass Measuring Cup Set-V-Shaped Spout，Includes 60ml(2OZ), 120ml(4OZ), and 250ml(8OZ) Glass Measuring Beaker for Kitchen or Restaurant, Easy to Read
description:
About this item
High Borosilicate Glass Measuring Cup Set,Includes 60ml(2OZ), 120ml(4OZ), and 250ml (8OZ)
Class a & glass science measuring beaker made of high quality 3.3 borosilicate.Apply to Electromagnetic Oven，Gas stove, Microwave, Electric Ceramic stove, Oven and Refrigerator.
Wide mouth design of the cup is easy to clean. V-shaped spout, Liquids can be pouring straight for easy to drainage.
The scale is more accurate.We carefully measured the ACTUAL VOLUME/CAPACITY of the glass measuring cup to make it clearly for our valued customers like you, Make the scale error controlled within ±0.5%
Dishwasher safe, Most chemical liquids, such as acids and bases can be placed.2 different measurement scales,Fluid Ounces, and Millilters double scale
reviews_5s:
I originally got this cup to mix my baby's formula in and I plan on using it once we are done with formula. It's a great size to comfortably hold and is pretty sturdy. I am a pretty clumsy person and I handle things pretty roughly, this stood the test! I did end up breaking the first one I bought, but I swear it was a fluke and it hit the porcelain sink at just the right angle.I bought this to measure coffee water for my Aeropress. The markings are easy to read even with it sitting on the counter, and the size fits well with my coffee bar. It has a nice solid feel too it. I would buy it again.These are really good glass beakers. Well made. Very useful.

The writing is easy to read.

The glass is standard beaker glass and very well formed. No imperfections are present. The glass is thicker than some beakers are, and not thin by beaker standards. They are similar to Pyrex beakers which are just as thick. Note that beakers are not nearly as thick as typical glass measuring cups are. Hence the bad reviews from people expecting glass that's thicker than beaker glass.

Well worth the money. I have other beakers that are 5 times the price for the same quality glass but with inferior measurement marks.The ML and oz markings on the cup are clear and very detailed. The pouring lip is very useful.Bought these for pouring liquid into small bottles without spills. They work great and have very nice measurements on the sideAs advertised, quality product in right sizes for convenient use.This is a great set of measuring beakers with clear markings.Perfect size and good glass material.Beaker worked out perfect.This is a unique item for the kitchen. Makes mixing the drinks fun
reviews_1s:
Very thin glass. The 4oz cup broke during unpacking and broken glass cut my hand. I do not expect either of the other two to last much longer.
Update My hand is healed but 8oz cracked and I didn’t even use it once.All the lines that show the measurements wore away in the first month. I hand wash it but the lines have still worn away and now it can't be used as a measuring cup.glass breaks very easy tap them to gether just a little when i was placing them on the table & to brokeThe two smaller cups are great but the big one came cracked.Red coloring came off after ONE washing - returnedDangerous! They are very very frail. I had 2 of them fall one sitting inside the other when they fell 4 inches on to a carpeted floor and shattered in many long slivers of glass. Not only was i shock that broke at all but the way they shattered into slivers.Play Video
I don’t use excessive amounts of chemicals or excessively hot water and the measurements have almost completely worn off alreadyThe markings disappear after a few washes…
